title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Letter from Sin-iddinam to Utu
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Letter from Sin-iddinam to Utu.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Letter from Sin-iddinam to Utu.

translation.text: From 'Letter from Sin-iddinam to Utu': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
